summary: Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience designing and deploying AI/ML and Generative AI solutions. Built RAG-based chatbot systems, automated ML pipelines, and scalable backend APIs using Python, FastAPI, LangChain, and React, improving operational efficiency by up to 60%. Applied NLP, deep learning, and ETL pipelines to process large-scale data and deliver production-ready solutions. Strong foundation in Big Data Analytics from CDAC with hands-on experience in real-world AI applications.
